The Annihilator Quest

The Annihilator Quest
Attributes
NameThe Annihilator Quest
Level Required100
PremiumYes
LocationJakundaf Desert
RewardsDemon Helmet, Stonecutter Axe, Magic Plate Armor, or Present Box
Creatures to FaceDemon (6)
LegendDeep in the Jakundaf Desert lies a dangerous dungeon where adventurers must face six demons to claim their reward.
Required ItemsKey 0010

The Annihilator Quest is one of the most famous quests in Tibia. It requires a team of four players to defeat six demons in a small room.
